header.title: Open Graph Previewer — Preview Social Share Cards Instantly
header.description: Free Open Graph previewer to see how your page looks when shared on Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Discord, Slack, and more. Fetch OG tags from any URL or paste your own meta tags. Debug og:title, og:description, og:image, and Twitter Cards to ensure perfect social sharing.
header.keywords: open graph previewer, og preview, social share preview, facebook share preview, twitter card preview, og tag checker, social media preview

input.htmlPlaceholder:
<meta property="og:title" content="My Page">
<meta property="og:description" content="...">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://...">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">

preview.enterUrlOrTags: Enter a URL or paste meta tags to preview

tips.corsProxy: Uses a CORS proxy to fetch meta tags. Some sites may block external requests — use "Paste Tags" instead.

howToUse.title: How to Use OG Previewer
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste the URL of the page you want to preview, or paste raw meta tags directly
howToUse.step2Desc: Click Fetch to retrieve OG tags from the URL, or Parse to analyze pasted tags
howToUse.step3Desc: See how your page appears on Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and more
howToUse.step4Desc: Manually edit tag values and re-preview to ensure perfect social sharing

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.stats: 6 OG tags found · 1200×630 px image · Valid Open Graph protocol
examples.result: Rich preview with title, description, image, and site name

items.question: What is Open Graph?
items.answer: Open Graph is a protocol that enables web pages to become rich objects in social media by controlling how titles, descriptions, images, and URLs appear when shared.

items.question: Why is OG preview important?
items.answer: OG preview ensures your content looks attractive when shared on platforms like Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter, which can significantly improve engagement and click-through rates.

items.question: What is the ideal OG image size?
items.answer: The recommended OG image size is 1200×630 pixels with a 1.91:1 aspect ratio. Images should be under 5MB and in PNG or JPG format.

items.question: Do I need OG tags for SEO?
items.answer: OG tags do not directly affect search rankings, but they improve social sharing visibility, which can lead to more traffic and indirect SEO benefits.
